title: Frustration, worry and hope: Canadian businesses brace for the latest round of U.S. tariffs
description: While some businesses plan to hold steady in the face of a new U.S. tariff threat, others are dreading what they say could be a death knell. And with specific industries likely to be hit hard, business leaders are hoping the new threats could spur momentum on a trade deal with the U.S.
text: While some businesses plan to hold steady in the face of a new U.S. tariff threat, others are dreading what they say could be a death knell. And with specific industries likely to be hit hard, business leaders are hoping the new threats could spur momentum on a trade deal with the U.S.
speech_text:
Frustration, worry and hope: Canadian businesses brace for the latest round of U.S. tariffs.

While some businesses plan to hold steady in the face of a new U.S. tariff threat, others are dreading what they say could be a death knell. And with specific industries likely to be hit hard, business leaders are hoping the new threats could spur momentum on a trade deal with the U.S.
thai_text: ขณะที่ธุรกิจบางส่วนวางแผนที่จะยึดมั่นต่อหน้าการคุกคามค่าธรรมเนียมใหม่ของสหรัฐฯ. และขณะที่อุตสาหกรรมเฉพาะเจาะจงอาจได้รับผลกระทบอย่างหนัก ผู้บริหารธุรกิจหวังว่า ความคุกคามใหม่จะกระตุ้นการตกลงการค้ากับสหรัฐอเมริกา.
